scripts.dev: concurrently -n scraper,dlq,proxy,learner,scanner -c yellow,red,blue,cyan,green "tsx watch src/scraper.ts" "tsx watch src/dlq-triage.ts" "tsx watch src/proxy-health.ts" "tsx watch src/pattern-learner.ts" "tsx watch src/keyword-scanner.ts"
scripts.start: concurrently "node dist/scraper.js" "node dist/dlq-triage.js" "node dist/proxy-health.js" "node dist/pattern-learner.js" "node dist/keyword-scanner.js"
